content.problemStatement: Given the heads of two linked lists, list1 and list2, where each linked list has its elements sorted in non-decreasing order, merge them into a single sorted linked list and return the head of the merged linked list.
content.inputFormat: Two linked lists, list1 and list2, where each linked list has its elements sorted in non-decreasing order.
content.outputFormat: The head of the merged sorted linked list.

solution.approach: Iterate through both linked lists and store elements in an array. Sort the array and convert it back to a linked list.
solution.timeComplexity: O(n log n) due to sorting
solution.spaceComplexity: O(n) for storing elements in an array
